title: Festival of Great Trade
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Festival_of_Great_Trade.jpg|thumb|right]] '''Festival of Great Trade''' was a holiday on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Svivren]] specifically in [[Wrils]]. It involved hordes of merchant-pilgrims marching through cities' trade and negotiation areas.

==Appearances==
*[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 1|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 1]] {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
